hero.subtitle: AI-powered fire detection integrating Computer Vision, IoT Sensor Fusion, and real-time alerting — before flames become disaster.

problem.label: THE PROBLEM
problem.title: Traditional Systems Fail When It Matters
problem.description: Conventional smoke detectors only react after fire has grown. Without visual intelligence and data analysis, early detection is impossible.

stats.label: Average manual response time without AI
Fires preventable with detection under 60 seconds

items.title: AI Computer Vision
items.description: YOLO and Semantic Segmentation analyze CCTV feeds in real-time. Detecting smoke, fire, and visual anomalies before traditional sensors react.

items.title: IoT Sensor Fusion
items.description: Data from MQ gas sensors, temperature, and humidity are fused through machine learning algorithms for multi-dimensional risk assessment.

items.title: Real-Time Alerting
items.description: Instant notifications via WhatsApp, live monitoring dashboard, and automatic escalation to security teams within seconds.

techStack.label: ARCHITECTURE
techStack.title: Built for Reliability
techStack.description: Scalable microservices architecture, designed for 24/7 operation with zero downtime.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to see IFRIT in action?

about.heroSubtitle: Building the future of fire safety with artificial intelligence.

mission.label: MISSION
mission.title: Preventing Disaster Before It Happens
mission.description: IFRIT was born from the belief that AI technology can save lives. We develop fire detection systems that don't just react, but predict and prevent.

items.title: Reliability
items.description: Systems that work when needed most.

items.title: Rapid Response
items.description: Every second counts in an emergency.

solutions.heroSubtitle: Intelligent fire protection for every type of facility.

items.title: Office Buildings
items.description: Multi-floor monitoring with existing CCTV integration and IoT sensors in every zone.

items.title: Warehouses & Factories
items.description: Hazardous gas detection, abnormal temperature monitoring, and open fire detection in material storage areas.

items.title: Public Facilities
items.description: Protection for hospitals, schools, and shopping centers with mass alerting capabilities.

items.description: High-precision temperature monitoring and environmental anomaly detection for critical infrastructure.
